title: centaurea ciliaris
intro: Centaurea ciliaris, also known as the ciliate knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Centaurea ciliaris include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
